text: This app is nice investing in stocks, bonds mutual funds and other investment avenues. The facilities are convenient and user friendly.

I would love to see Goww introduce an Affordable FnO feature that allows users to trade with lower capital requirements. This could include smaller lot sizes, micro contracts, or curated low-cost FnO opportunities

The Groww app is an exceptional choice for Gen Z, millennials, and first-time retail investors looking to build passive wealth through mutual funds and long-term equity. While ultra-active intraday traders might hit a ceiling with its feature set, its unmatched ease of use, transparent pricing, and zero-AMC model make it a premier financial application in the market today.
one of the worst app in stock market the charts are worst ... the charges are like crazy i think zerodha is better app ... please improve the charts aor else half of the invester will leave the app

good Experience every thing is very easy to access, using it for almost a year good response, it should have a update which is to have different tabs for stocks and mutual fund so it can be tracked accordingly.
unable to login. the web interface is good, app stopped working, uninstalled and reinstalled but now can't login.

This App is a Scam specially when you buy positions using MTF. They will square off your position even when wallet balance is positive, they will put your balance into Negative without any reason. They squared off my position for which i paid 100 % as hair cut keeps changing but after squaring off my position they put my wallet into Negative which was positive earlier then where did the money go after squaring off positions. Indmoney is a far better app than this they never do such things.

The app experienced a severe technical glitch during live trading, and customer support’s resolution process is completely unacceptable. They are insisting that I provide a screen recording of the glitch to prove the issue. "wrost customer care service ever"

Pls make it possible to change the timeline in Sector Trending Today Page. Only 1 day change can be seen, make it 3/6 months and one year also, so that one can make decisions more accurately and timely.

One of the best platforms to invest money and trades in. User interface is seamless and the platform provides a certain support everytime a ticket is raised for a query. It can help you fall in love with the beauty of investing.
I just wanted to know why you guys are not adding a kill switch in your application...?

Do not join groww MF Prime. They offer only regular funds. You can't invest in Direct funds. Who the hell offers regular fund these days. I felt cheated when my money got into regular fund . Now Iam supposed to pay STCG tax and 1% exit load just for switching to direct fund. Trust has been broken!!!!
Last few months this app is unusable. every time page fail to load page fail to load even when there is good internet connection.

I bought an Aye Finance Ltd bond through Groww, but my payout has not been credited. Despite investing through their platform, Groww has refused to help and said I must deal directly with the RTA, offering no support. This kind of response is very concerning for investors. People invest their hard-earned money expecting basic assistance when issues arise, but there is no support when it is actually needed. I would strongly advise others to be careful before relying on this platform 4 investment

I have had a very good experience using Groww. The app is simple, user-friendly, and makes investing in stocks, mutual funds, and other financial products easy, even for beginners. Account opening was smooth, transactions are fast, and the interface is clean and intuitive. Overall, Groww is a reliable platform for anyone looking to start or grow their investment journey. Highly recommend
